name: plugin-dev-claude
description: Plugin development toolkit for creating Claude Code agents, commands, hooks, MCP integrations, settings, structure, and skills.

interface.shortDescription: Build and review Claude Code plugins with structured development guidance.
interface.longDescription: Plugin Dev Claude provides Codex-compatible skill metadata for a Claude Code plugin development toolkit, covering plugin structure, skill creation, agent design, command development, hook implementation, MCP integration, and plugin settings patterns.
defaultPrompt: Use Plugin Dev Claude to scaffold a new Claude Code plugin with proper structure, manifest, and auto-discovery configuration.
Use Plugin Dev Claude to create a skill with focused triggers, progressive disclosure, and bundled resources.
Use Plugin Dev Claude to design and implement Claude Code agent workflows, slash commands, and event-driven hooks.
